div1.entryFree: Bear-herd, (this is the Shakespearian form of the word, cf. Shr. Ind. 2, 21 and H4B I, 2, 192; the other passages have berrord, berard and bearard, but never bear-ward, as some M. Edd. choose to write), bear-leader: Ado II, 1, 43. Shr. Ind. 2, 21. H4B I, 2, 192. H6B V, 1, 149. H6B V, 1, 149
